## Summary

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Methodology
- [ ] Refactor

## Tests run

- [ ] `npm run db:generate`
- [ ] `npm run db:push`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Methodology impact

Describe any changes to questionnaires, formulas, assumptions, or interpretation of results.

## Checklist

- [ ] No real event data was added.
- [ ] No secrets or credentials were added.
- [ ] No CPF, mandatory phone, or mandatory respondent name was added.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior or methodology changed.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for calculation changes.
